name: thabetamer-portfolio
description: Portfolio MCP server for Thabet Amer — Technical Leader & Solutions Architect with 15+ years building scalable systems across 20+ global markets.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Returns professional profile: bio, tagline, years of experience, markets served, and services.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: Returns all portfolio projects with title, client, role, description, tags, and year.

tools.name: search_projects_by_tag
tools.description: Filter portfolio projects by tag: product, architecture, cloud, ai, devops, startups, saas, edtech, agritech, ict4d, gov.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Returns a single portfolio project by id, including full details and image.

tools.name: get_experience
tools.description: Returns career timeline: all roles with title, company, period, and type.

tools.name: get_certifications
tools.description: Returns professional certifications and educational degrees with verification URLs.

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Returns contact information: email, LinkedIn, and GitHub.
